name: Barbeque Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds beef or pork roast, up to 4
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chopped onion, sugar, dry mustard, salt, pepper, paprika, cider vinegar, worcestershire sauce, and ketchup in a saucepan over medium heat until well combined.
2. Simmer the mixture for 3-5 minutes.
3. Pour the sauce over the roast in a roasting pan.
4. Cook the roast in an oven preheated to 325°F (165°C) for 3 hours, basting frequently with the sauce.
5. Allow the roast to cool completely, then shred it using two forks.
6. Serve the shredded pork on rolls or over noodles. The roast will be juicy and tender once shredded.
